title: Stop / start your Cove
when: You need to take the Cove offline or bring it back up.
description: Stop leaves your data intact (volumes persist). 'down -v' DELETES your data — don't use it unless you mean to wipe the Cove. Run from your Cove's folder.

steps.label: Stop + remove containers (keeps data)
steps.note: Volumes persist. Your data is safe.
